member.name: T:NftId
member.summary: The (non-fungible) token of which this NFT is an instance

member.name: M:NftId.#ctor(TokenId,System.Int64)
member.summary: The (non-fungible) token of which this NFT is an instance

member.name: M:NftId.#ctor(TokenId,System.Int64)_2
member.summary: The unique identifier of this instance

member.name: M:NftId.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a new nft id from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:NftId.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Create a new nft id from a string.

member.name: M:NftId.FromProtobuf(Proto.NftID)
member.summary: Create a new ntf id from a protobuf.

member.name: M:NftId.ToStringWithChecksum(Client)
member.summary: Generate a string representation with checksum.
